title: The Listener
description: Speaker-to-persona mapping for psychological thriller multi-voice TTS production

narrator.notes: Third-person limited, close to Sarah. Controlled tension, observational.

sarah.notes: Protagonist dialogue. Measured, professional warmth, guarded personally.

thomas.notes: Antagonist dialogue. Soft, slow, unsettling. Pauses before responding.

cole.notes: Detective. Clipped, weary, gravelly. Noir register.

maya.notes: Dead sister - voicemails, flashbacks only. Phone compression for voicemails.

special_instructions.thomas_pauses: Add 600-1000ms pause before Thomas's dialogue. He never answers immediately.
special_instructions.voicemail_processing: Maya's voicemails should have telephone compression artifacts.
special_instructions.tension_pacing: During therapy scenes, slow overall pace by 15%. During threat scenes, quicken by 10%.
special_instructions.silence_beats: Honor all [SILENCE: beat] cues - these are dramatic pauses, not errors.
